title: rich midnight gooey indian score-fat curry
description: a unique, rich, and comforting curry that is perfect for a midnight craving or a special occasion, featuring the rich and creamy score-fat. this recipe is flexitarian-friendly, making it suitable for a variety of diets.
instructions: heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
add the chopped onion and saut8 until it is translucent, about 5 minutes.
add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
add the red curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until the oil separates.
add the diced tomato, salt, and black pepper, and cook for another 2-3 minutes, until the tomato is soft.
stir in the cocoa sugar and cook for 1 minute.
add the coconut milk and score-fat, and stir until well combined.
bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the score-fat has melted.
taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
